nl_query: Show the daily scanning velocity for each exam in December 2025: the number of scripts scanned per day, the change from the previous day, and the number of new bundles opened.
failed_sql: SELECT e.exam_date, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.id) AS scripts_scanned, (COUNT(DISTINCT sh.id) - LAG(COUNT(DISTINCT sh.id)) OVER (PARTITION BY e.exam_id ORDER BY e.exam_date)) AS change_from_previous_day, SUM(CASE WHEN sh.status = 'SCANNING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_bundles_opened FROM exam_schedule_cache e JOIN bundle b ON b.exam_id = e.exam_id JOIN scan_history sh ON sh.bundle_id = b.id WHERE e.exam_date BETWEEN '2025-12-01' AND '2025-12-31' AND sh.status = 'SCANNING' GROUP BY e.exam_date ORDER BY e.exam_date;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): scan_history.bundle_id, scan_history.status, scan_history.status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
